evals.prompt: Add generated metadata to Transcriptions/Reflecting on My Interview and Building Communication Control.md. Preserve existing frontmatter, use multiple note_types if needed, and validate the file after applying metadata.
evals.expected_output: The file has valid generated metadata in top-level frontmatter, including communication_analysis and product_entrepreneurship when justified, with blunt communication flaws and personalized practical takeaways.

evals.prompt: Process Transcriptions/Overwhelmed by Task Management and Prioritization.md with generate-metadata. I want the metadata to make the recurring productivity problem obvious when I search my vault later.
evals.expected_output: The file has valid generated metadata that captures the overwhelm/task-prioritization loop, practical commands, open problems, experiments, and relevant fears or identity beliefs without inventing people or projects.

evals.prompt: Generate metadata for these notes as a batch: Transcriptions/Realizations on Relationships, Sex, and Loyalty.md and Transcriptions/Sudden Firing and Account Disabling.md. Use wiki-links where helpful and keep the labels blunt.
evals.expected_output: Both files have valid generated metadata, each with note_types appropriate to the content, direct phrase labels, empty arrays where no signal exists, and preserved original frontmatter.
